query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.consultorId, a.bypassOnboarding,
       (SELECT name FROM consultors WHERE id = a.consultorId) as mentor,
       (SELECT id FROM users WHERE alunoId = a.id LIMIT 1) as userId
FROM alunos a
WHERE a.consultorId IN (SELECT id FROM consultors WHERE name LIKE '%Adriana%');
